name: Swarmia Engineering Effectiveness API
what_it_does: Engineering effectiveness platform — enabling engineering leaders to track DORA metrics, measure investment allocation (features vs bugs vs debt), analyze pull request cycle time, and identify team improvement opportunities from GitHub and Jira data, with a focus on responsible metrics that improve developer experience rather than surveillance.
use_cases: Tracking DORA metrics via Swarmia for engineering delivery performance measurement
Analyzing PR cycle time via Swarmia for identifying review and deployment bottlenecks
Measuring investment allocation via Swarmia API for feature vs tech debt planning
Monitoring team health via Swarmia for developer experience improvement programs
Exporting engineering metrics via Swarmia API for leadership dashboards and QBRs
not_for: Individual developer performance reviews (Swarmia explicitly opposes individual surveillance)
Real-time deployment monitoring (use Datadog or New Relic for observability)
Teams without GitHub integration (Swarmia requires GitHub)
best_when: An engineering leader wants DORA metrics and cycle time analytics with an ethical, developer-positive approach — Swarmia is designed to improve team dynamics, not surveil individuals.
avoid_when: You need individual developer productivity metrics, work without GitHub, or require public API access beyond their UI.

auth.notes: No public API documented. Swarmia is primarily a product UI platform. Data export available via CSV download in the UI. API access is not publicly offered — primarily UI-driven with GitHub/Jira OAuth integration for data ingestion. Contact sales for enterprise API access possibilities.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — free trial available
pricing.notes: Finnish company (Helsinki). Founded 2019 by Otto Hilska and Paulus Esterhuysen. $5M+ funding. GitHub integration required (GitLab in development). Jira integration for issue correlation. Focus on responsible metrics (avoid individual developer surveillance). Team-level insights. DORA metrics: deployment frequency, lead time for changes, change failure rate, MTTR. Investment analysis: what % of time on features vs bugs vs tech debt. WIP and PR review metrics. Used by: Personio, Supermetrics, other Finnish tech companies. Strong developer experience community engagement. No public REST API — UI and CSV export primary.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: NO PUBLIC API. CSV export only. Finnish company (GDPR). GitHub required. No webhooks. $25-40/user/month. Responsible metrics focus. Contact sales for enterprise API.
known_agent_gotchas: NO PUBLIC API — Swarmia does not offer a REST API for third-party integration
CSV export is the only programmatic data access path (from UI)
GitHub integration is required — GitLab support is in development/limited
Finnish company — strong GDPR compliance; EU data residency by default
Responsible metrics philosophy: team-level only — no individual developer tracking
Contact sales for enterprise API access (custom arrangements may be available)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced (app). GDPR compliant (Finnish company). No public API reduces external attack surface. GitHub OAuth for data ingestion — manage GitHub app permissions carefully. EU data residency. Engineering performance data is sensitive leadership information. Responsible metrics design — privacy-preserving by philosophy. No OAuth2 for third-party access.
